title: Japanese Grilled Aubergine with Roasted Red Pepper Sauce
description: A flavorful and visually appealing Japanese-inspired dish featuring grilled aubergine and a tangy roasted red pepper sauce. This recipe is perfect for a light and refreshing summer meal.

ingredients.name: Roasted red pepper
ingredients.notes: canned in water, drained and chopped

instructions: 1. Preheat grill or grill pan to medium-high heat.
2. Cut the baby aubergine in half lengthwise and brush with a little oil.
3. Grill the aubergine for 3-4 minutes per side, or until tender and lightly charred.
4. Meanwhile, mix the chopped roasted red pepper, Ethiopian spices, soy sauce, rice vinegar, and honey (if using) in a bowl.
5. Once the aubergine is cooked, place it on a plate and spoon the roasted red pepper sauce over the top.
